Variables.Name: bInitiallyLoaded
Variables.Description: Whether the level should be loaded at startup

Variables.Name: bInitiallyVisible
Variables.Description: Whether the level should be visible at startup if it is loaded

Functions.Name: LoadLevelInstance
Functions.Description:
Stream in a level with a specific location and rotation. You can create multiple instances of the same level!
 	
 	 The level to be loaded does not have to be in the persistent map's Levels list, however to ensure that the .umap does get
 	 packaged, please be sure to include the .umap in your Packaging Settings:
 	
 	   Project Settings -> Packaging -> List of Maps to Include in a Packaged Build (you may have to show advanced or type in filter)

Params.Name: LevelName
Params.Description: - Level package name, ex: GameMapsMyMapName, specifying short name like MyMapName will force very slow search on disk

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: - World space location where the level should be spawned

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: - World space rotation for rotating the entire level

Params.Name: bOutSuccess
Params.Description: - Whether operation was successful (map was found and added to the sub-levels list)

Return.Description: Streaming level object for a level instance
